summary: Tested Admin Matches Management (Partite) page. All backend APIs working correctly (19/19 tests passed). UI features verified: navigation to Partite via sidebar, table with all required columns, filter buttons (Tutte, Live, Programmate, Finite, Inconsistenti, Senza risultato), Edit modal with fields for Gol Casa, Gol Trasferta, Stato, Kickoff, Delete buttons. Fixed bug in Dashboard drill-down - 'Live ora' counter was using incorrect filter parameter (filter:live instead of status:live).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partite page fully functional. All CRUD operations work. Dashboard drill-downs to matches page work correctly with pre-applied filters.

navigation.sidebar_partite_nav: PASS - data-testid='nav-matches' clickable, navigates to Partite page

partite_page_table.enriched_fields: matchday_label and league_name present in API response

edit_modal.save_functionality: PASS - Toast 'Partita aggiornata' shown on success

delete_functionality.elimina_buttons: PASS - Present for each match row
delete_functionality.force_delete: PASS - If predictions exist, prompts for force=true

dashboard_drill_down.live_ora_counter: PASS - Fixed: now uses status:live instead of filter:live

backend_api_tests.GET_admin_matches_no_filter: PASS - Returns enriched matches with count
backend_api_tests.GET_admin_matches_filter_inconsistent: PASS - Matches in COMPLETED matchdays with non-finished status

bug_fixed.issue: Dashboard 'Live ora' counter drill-down was not applying Live filter
bug_fixed.root_cause: Dashboard was using navigateWith('matches',{filter:'live'}) but backend expects status=live for live matches, not filter=live
bug_fixed.verification: After fix, clicking 'Live ora' in dashboard navigates to Partite with Live filter active, showing correct count (26 matches)
